summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of portfolio application with all requested updates. All 7 requested features are working correctly including profile image, download resume functionality, certifications section, AI Agents skills category, and Streamlit integration.
passed_tests: Profile image displays correctly in hero section with proper styling and loading
Download Resume button works in both hero and contact sections with correct PDF download functionality
Certifications section displays AWS Machine Learning Specialty and AWS Cloud Practitioner from Udemy
AI Agents skill category contains all requested skills: LangChain Agents, Agentic RAG, Function Calling, Single-Agent Systems
Streamlit is correctly listed in Frontend Development skills category
Navigation includes Certifications link and all navigation works properly
All existing sections (About, Experience, Skills, Projects, Contact) function correctly
No JavaScript errors found on the page
Responsive design and styling working properly
